data.title: Add --tags flag to ticket-create.sh and include tags in CREATE event JSON
data.description:
## Implementation

Add `--tags` flag support to `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh`:

1. Initialize `tags=""` before the arg-parsing while loop
2. Add `--tags` and `--tags=*` cases to the while loop (same pattern as `--assignee`/`--assignee=*`)
3. Pass `tags` as a new positional arg to the existing `python3 -c` CREATE event builder invocation
4. In the python3 block: convert the tags string to a list using the same pattern as the EDIT handler:
   `tags_list = [t.strip() for t in tags_str.split(',') if t.strip()] if tags_str else []`
5. Include `'tags': tags_list` in the `data` dict passed to the CREATE event

Files to modify:
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh` — arg-parsing loop and python3 event builder block

## TDD Requirement

RED tests already exist:
- Test 15 (`test_tags_flag_creates_ticket_with_tags`) in `tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh`
- Test 16 (`test_no_tags_flag_creates_empty_tags`) in `tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh`

Run them before the fix to confirm Test 15 fails (RED), then after to confirm both pass (GREEN).
Note: Test 15 uses `ticket show` which calls the reducer — Task 55f7-5dfc must be completed first.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] Test 15 passes: `ticket create bug "test" --tags CLI_user` creates ticket with CLI_user in tags
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "Test 15.*PASS|PASS.*Test 15"
- [ ] Test 16 passes: `ticket create bug "test"` (no --tags) creates ticket with empty tags array
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "Test 16.*PASS|PASS.*Test 16"
- [ ] `ticket create --help` output mentions `--tags` flag
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "tags" || bash plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-create.sh --help 2>&1 | grep -q "tags"
